text:
The Galactic Matron (, Ginga no Sobo—lit. "Galactic Grandmother") is a former, self-proclaimed clairvoyant and a fraudster, now an incarcerated convict. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 96 

Appearance

The Galactic Matron is a stout woman who wears her long hair in a ponytail, has prominent lower eyelashes, and a snub nose. She wears a simple dress and adorns herself with a considerable amount of jewelry (rings, bracelets, necklaces, and earrings).

Personality

The Galactic Matron used to give ominous fortunes so that her clients could improve their lives and avoid misfortune. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

In a conversation between Neon and Chrollo, the former initially alludes to her by mentioning the purpose of her fortunes. Chrollo realizes she's talking about the Galactic Matron and says she was arrested years later for fraud. Neon replies that her philosophy made her want to become a fortune-teller when she grew up. Chrollo points out that the Matron didn't believe in an afterlife, and Neon says that it's partly why she doesn't either. 

Manga Appearances

Quotes

"The purpose of fortunes is to make people happy. My fortunes often have ominous warnings... because that way, people would make an effort to improve their lives and avoid misfortune." 

Trivia

In Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation, the character's name is "Galactic Grandma". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 51 (2011) 

Anime and Manga Differences

In both anime adaptations, only the Galactic Matron's title and backstory are given, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 60 (1999) while in the manga she is also shown speaking in a flashback. 

Translations around the World

References
